title: Re:Create Forge
description: A Forge Port Of The Original Re:Create Modpack On Fabric
body:
# Re:Create Forge

So I am Currently Obsessed With [Shalz's](https://www.youtube.com/@Shalz) Minecraft [Re:Create SMP Series](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLJbbd45uioC8CTwCcHxECZg9hxQkxRMFF&si=r0Z2jzcYqc73lkjO) So I Downloaded The Modpack and For Some Odd Reason It Didn't Work (It's On Fabric Btw) So Then I Went On Forge To See If I Could Re-make The Modpack On Forge and Here I Bring You The Re:Create Modpack On Forge

Have Fun Creating :D

Oh and Here Is The [Re:Create Community Discord](https://discord.com/invite/xSYGzGPj5Z) and Also [Shalz's Discord](https://discord.com/invite/YTeY64AeB4) Server's
